series_metadata.series_description: records produced by the Department of Commerce containing advice to local government entities about land use, economic development, and other similar planning projects; includes maps generated by GIS applications, reports, studies, ordinances, and other related project documentation

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Reference value ends ± THEN: Destroy Agency Policy: ________________ NOTE: Transfer official copy of project documentation to local government entity on behalf of which the project was completed

series_metadata.series_title: Historically Underutilized Businesses (HUB) Records (continued on following page)
series_metadata.series_description: HUB records concerning minority, disabled, or female-owned businesses; includes verification/certification and approval letters, site visit documentation, and other related records

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center when reference value ends for immediate transfer to the custody of the Archives.

series_metadata.series_title: Historically Underutilized Businesses (HUB) Records (continued on following page)
series_metadata.series_description: data collected by HUB; includes construction as well as goods and services reporting

series_metadata.series_title: Historically Underutilized Businesses (HUB) Records (continued on following page)
series_metadata.series_description: letters of denial and other related records to or from vendors who have been denied HUB designation; also includes unrequired submissions

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Complete PLUS: 1 year THEN: Destroy*

series_metadata.series_description: purchasing reports submitted to HUB by every governmental entity required by statute to use the services of the Department of Administration in the purchase of goods and services, every local school administrative unit, and every private, nonprofit corporation (that receives an appropriation of $500,000 or more during a fiscal year from the General Assembly); also includes building project reports regarding minority business participation reports

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Received PLUS: 6 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_title: Industrial Client Records from the Economic Development Partnership of North Carolina (EDPNC)
series_metadata.series_description: EDPNC records concerning foreign and domestic business clients; includes reports, annual reports of companies, brochures, memoranda, plans, employer profiles, customized training proposals, and photographs

tracking_data.comments: Export all public record data, including attachments, from customer relationship management system 5 years after completion or cancellation of project. Electronic records will transfer immediately to the custody of the Archives.

series_metadata.series_title: Industrial Client Records from the Economic Development Partnership of North Carolina (EDPNC)
series_metadata.series_description: information about EDPNC leads and prospective clients

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Received PLUS: 3 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_title: Trade Show Records from the Economic Development Partnership of North Carolina (EDPNC) (continued on following page)
series_metadata.series_description: EDPNC proposals, publicity results, financial reports, itineraries, and other related records

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Complete PLUS: 3 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: official copies of maps, brochures, advertisements, and other promotional materials produced by the Economic Development Partnership of North Carolina; includes maps, brochures, and copies of digital media uploaded to websites or social media platforms

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center when reference value ends for immediate transfer to the custody of the Archives.

series_metadata.series_description: official copies of statistical data and expenditure reports concerning travel and tourism in North Carolina accumulated by the Economic Development Partnership of North Carolina

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center when reference value ends for immediate transfer to the custody of the Archives.

series_metadata.series_description: correspondence between the Department of Commerce and individuals, state agencies, organizations, and companies regarding dedications and other welcome center affairs

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center when reference value ends for immediate transfer to the custody of the Archives.
